title: 18 Upcoming Dividend Increases To Finish Q1
text: All these stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 11.0% and a median increase of 8.4%.

title: Yields Plunge, REITs Crater
text: Tired of hearing "rates up, REITs down?" Same here. There are more factors to consider. Treasury yields are falling as more investors recognize the death of inflation and call for rates to be cut by the end of the year.

title: 10 REIT Investor Mistakes: Avoid Them At All Costs
text: REITs can be very rewarding. But they can also be very punishing if you pick the wrong ones.

title: Buy The Dip: 2 REITs For 2023
text: We find most opportunities in the small-cap segment of the REIT market. They often trade at large discounts to their larger peers.

title: Camden Property Trust (CPT) Investor Presentation - Slideshow
text: The following slide deck was published by Camden Property Trust in conjunction with this event.

title: Camden Property Trust Announces Participation in Citi's 2023 Global Property CEO Conference and Provides First Quarter 2023 Operating Update
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) (the “Company”) announced today that the Company will participate in Citi's 2023 Global Property CEO Conference. Camden's roundtable discussion has been scheduled for Tuesday, March 7, 2023, at 2:20 PM Eastern Time. The event will be webcast live in a listen-only mode at camdenliving.com in the Investors section, and an audio archive will be available on the Company's website shortly after the event concludes.
